title: No ESC in GUI
description: This mod disables the ESC key in GUIs.
body:
🛑 No ESC In GUI
Prevents GUI closures caused by the ESC key.

This mod disables the ESC key in most in-game screens like inventory, chests, crafting tables, furnaces, anvils, and custom GUIs. The pause menu remains unaffected — ESC still works there as expected.

🔧 Configurable via Mod Menu

 ⦁ Toggle ESC blocking on or off anytime
 
 ⦁ Changes apply instantly without restarting

Perfect for players who want to learn to close GUIs with their inventory hotkey.
